title: DP-ItemEditor
body:
![](https://dpnw.site/assets/img/desc_card/dppcore.jpg) **All DP-Plugins depend on the [DPP-Core](https://dpnw.site/plugins/DPP-Core) plugin.
Please make sure to install [DPP-Core](https://dpnw.site/plugins/DPP-Core)** **Discord** **Join our Discord server to get support and stay updated with the latest news and updates. If you have any questions or suggestions, please join our Discord server. If you find any bugs, please report them using the inquiry channel.** **Discord Invite: https://discord.gg/JnMCqkn2FX** ![](https://dpnw.site/assets/img/desc_card/desc.jpg) **DP-ItemEditor Plugin Introduction** DP-ItemEditor is a Minecraft plugin that provide commands to easy edit item. **Plugin Features** - **DLang Support**: You can freely edit language files.
**Commands** - /dpie name - /dpie loreadd - /dpie loreset - /dpie loredel - /dpie type - /dpie custommodeldata - /dpie custommodeldataremove - /dpie enchant - /dpie enchantremove - /dpie addflag - /dpie removeflag - /dpie durability ![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a100299fd22f026a49b5d1bbeaef2e8bbf2d31f.jpeg)
